ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Continued To Aug-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Yip, via ZOOM, counsel for Albert Wong, Personal Representative.

Counsel at the outset advises the court that since the last calling of this matter, he filed an Inventory and Appraisal and is working on preparing a Petition for Final Distribution and requests a short continuance accordingly.

The hearing on Status on Close of Estate is continued to August 16, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-10-2021 Continued To Jun-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-01-2021 Continued To May-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Video Conference:
Kurt Yip for Petitioner.

The Court asked why the petitioner was appointed in July of 2019 and letters have not been issued yet. Mr. Yip stated that he didn't realize letters were needed since the only asset is real estate, that he sent the letters to be recorded in January when he was notified by the Probate Examiner, that new letters were sent to the petitioner to be re-signed, and that he needs to get a new probate referee appointed since the original probate referee is no longer doing it and then can file the inventory and appraisal, and apologized for allowing this to fall through the cracks as he has been dealing with personal issues as well as everything that has been going on with Covid. The Court noted there are additional beneficiaries other than the petitioner, instructed Mr. Yip to drop off an ex parte application to get a new probate referee since the originally appointed referee has retired, stated that it appreciates Mr. Yip's attitude, and asked if 60 days is enough time.

The status hearing on close of estate is continued to May 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: S. Le. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
